---
title: "`r params$title`"
author: "`r params$author`"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    css: www/report.css
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
params:
  title:  "Dynamic Report"
  author: "Group Academic Project"
  data:   NULL
  notes:  ""
  sections: !r c("kpi","table","charts","stats")
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 8, fig.height = 4)
library(dplyr); library(ggplot2); library(knitr); library(scales)
df      <- params$data
nv      <- names(df)[sapply(df, is.numeric)]
n_miss  <- sum(is.na(df))
```

## Analysis Notes

`r params$notes`

---

```{r kpi, eval = "kpi" %in% params$sections}
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    Metric = c("Total Rows","Total Columns","Numeric Variables","Missing Values"),
    Value  = c(nrow(df), ncol(df), length(nv), n_miss)
  ),
  caption = "KPI Summary", align = "lr"
)
```

```{r stats, eval = "stats" %in% params$sections, results = 'asis'}
cat("## Statistical Summary\n\n```\n")
print(summary(df))
cat("\n```\n")
```

```{r table, eval = "table" %in% params$sections}
knitr::kable(head(df, 30), caption = "Filtered Data (first 30 rows)")
```

```{r charts, eval = "charts" %in% params$sections && length(nv) >= 2}
ggplot(df, aes_string(x = nv[1], y = nv[2])) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, colour = "#2196f3", size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", colour = "red", se = TRUE, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title   = paste("Scatter:", nv[1], "vs", nv[2]),
       caption = "Generated by Dynamic Reporting Tool") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "#1a237e"))
```

---
*Report generated by the **Dynamic Reporting Tool** — Group Academic Project*
